revisedCandidateClaim: Inside the narrowed package-metadata and sparse-table scope, receipt stability remains useful as a hygiene requirement, but the descriptor residual candidate did not show enough baseline-resistant, replay-stable signal to remain a discovery candidate.
rejectedComponents: package metadata residual as discovery signal
sparse-table residual when missingness baseline dominates
preservedComponents: receipt stability as a necessary audit field
baseline and mutation diagnostics as review tools
some partial residual signals for future hypothesis generation
